attributes.title: [SQL Server OTel] Memory & saturation
attributes.description: Buffer pool health, memory usage, TempDB space, and memory grant pressure.

This dashboard tracks memory and saturation metrics:
- Page life expectancy (target > 300s)
- Buffer cache hit ratio (target > 95%)
- Memory usage and memory grants pending
- TempDB space and version store size
- Free list stalls (extreme memory pressure)
